name: Michelle Buteau
blurb: Her Netflix special Welcome to Buteaupia won a Critics' Choice Award, and A Buteau-ful Mind made her the first woman to film a comedy special at Radio City Music Hall.
bio: Michelle Buteau is an American stand-up comedian, actress, and host of Haitian and Jamaican descent, known for fast, warm crowd work and material on dating, marriage, and motherhood. Her Netflix special Welcome to Buteaupia won a Critics' Choice Award, and A Buteau-ful Mind made her the first woman to film a comedy special at Radio City Music Hall. She also created and stars in the Netflix series Survival of the Thickest.

timeline.ev: Performs stand-up for the first time days after the September 11 attacks
Releases Netflix special Welcome to Buteaupia
Series Survival of the Thickest premieres on Netflix
Films A Buteau-ful Mind, first woman to tape a special at Radio City

accolades: Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Comedy Special, Welcome to Buteaupia (2021)
First woman to film a comedy special at Radio City Music Hall
